design_philosophy.description: Frictionless, authoritative, and extremely clear. The design eliminates the bureaucratic feel of government forms, replacing it with the sleek, high-conversion flow of a top-tier SaaS or e-commerce checkout. Every action must feel simple and inevitable.
key_principles: Clarity over Decoration: 95% of the UI is monochrome. Color exists exclusively to highlight money and actionable items.
Density with Breathing Room: Use strict bento grids for the dashboard. Fill the space purposefully but pad the containers generously.
Tangible Progress: The 'Money Wheel' is the emotional center. It must feel like real money waiting to be claimed.

primary.description: Emerald Green - Reserved strictly for success metrics, 'Apply Now' CTAs, and Secured Funds.

secondary.description: Amber - Used for pending actions, Draft Reviews, and 'Potential' funds on the Money Wheel.

spacing_and_layout.padding_system: p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision. Use generous padding.

surfaces_and_components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200. The 'Clay & Crisp' look.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500
surfaces_and_components.money_wheel: Circular Recharts PieChart or custom SVG donut chart. Thick strokes. Emerald for Secured, Amber/Gray for Potential. Large typography in the center showing total.
surfaces_and_components.grant_action_cards: Must look like checkout items. Clear title, large Match Score (e.g., 96%), and a single prominent CTA button (Apply, Review, Upload NOA).

motion.hover: Translate Y up by 2px, shadow increase.
motion.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward drift (framer-motion).
motion.stagger: List items in the Grant Portfolio should stagger in on load.

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background. Use with a white/gradient overlay to ensure text readability.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using a strict 'Control Room' Bento grid (Mode B). Make sure the Money Wheel and the Grant Portfolio sit side-by-side on desktop.

Implement the 'Money Wheel' as a prominent circular visualization (using Recharts PieChart or similar). Show $0 Secured (Empty/Gray) and $125k Potential (Amber or Emerald). Center the total value inside the donut.

Design Grant Action Cards as highly actionable modules. Include AI Match Score as a badge (e.g., '96% Match'). Ensure the CTA (Review Draft, Upload NOA, Apply Now) is the most prominent element on the card.
Do NOT use default Shadcn themes without customization. Apply the 'Clay & Crisp' surface strategy: white backgrounds, 1px slate-200 borders, soft shadows.
Ensure all fonts use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Install these via Google Fonts.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Make the flow feel like an e-commerce checkout: simple, step-by-step, no overwhelming government jargon.
